query: SELECT is_active, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM products WHERE store_id = 1 GROUP BY is_active ORDER BY is_active;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT is_active, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM products WHERE store_id = 1 GROUP BY is_active ORDER BY is_active;
